title: Server Chat Sync
description: Syncs the server chat history to players
body:
This mod allows players to see the previous chat history of the server before they joined. It's really helpful when you join the server and then can see the previous messages of a conversation or leave messages for when a friend gets online.

By default the mod stores the last 100 messages. But if you use the [Longer Chat History Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/longer-chat-history), you can increase the amount of messages stored in the config file!
